title: The Horned Assassin (Vaeroth?)
bodyText:
Lolth's chief hunter on Varen's trail. ~8ft, midnight-black skin, curved horns from the temples, pure white pupil-less eyes, chitinous shifting armor, shadows clinging unnaturally. Speaks in a voice that resonates through stone: *"Betrayer, your blood is remembered. You escaped once. There will not be a second time."*

# Current truth
- Has appeared three times: the camp visitation (obsidian stone, S12), and twice more closing in — most recently telling Varen he is **out of time** (S13). Leaves eight-pointed-star signs. Never fights directly; hit-and-run, separate-and-wear-down.
- Import archive names an image **Vaeroth** under "8 Assassins" — likely this one's name. Portrait: art/vaeroth.jpg
